id.description: A UUID string identifying this agent application.

last_n.description: If set, return only the most recent N messages from the conversation. `usage_total` is still computed over the full session — only the transcript is trimmed. The response includes `conversation_trimmed: true` and `conversation_total_turns` so the caller knows how much was hidden.

session_id.description: UUID of the session to fetch (must belong to this application).
